Some correct syntax for variable annotation here.
More examples are in test_grammar and test_parser.
no_type_check
ClassVar
f.<locals>.CN)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__
(/usr/lib64/python3.9/test/ann_module2.py
returnc
selfr
__init__
C.__init__)
intr
NTCN)
paramr
meth
NTC.meth)
complexr
varN)
__annotations__r
__doc__
typingr
floatr
objectZ
new_attrr
<module>
